subcodes.first_line: O people! Drink ye the choice wine of the Most Glorious, ere the mighty outcry be raised, lest whispers affect you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان اشربوا یا قوم رحیق الابهی قبل ان یرتفع نعیق الکبری لئلا یوثر فیکم همسات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
